stmt: SELECT TOP 100 [Id], [Name], [Email] FROM [{schema}].[{table}] ORDER BY [CreatedDate] DESC
SELECT t1.[Id], t1.[Name] FROM [{schema}].[{table}] t1 INNER JOIN [{schema}].[Orders] t2 ON t1.[Id] = t2.[CustomerId] WHERE t2.[Status] = @P1
SELECT SUM([Amount]) AS Total, DATEPART(month, [CreatedDate]) AS [Month] FROM [{schema}].[{table}] GROUP BY DATEPART(month, [CreatedDate])
